Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestContext

Packages that use RestContext
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc
REST Remote Procedure Call API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support

  • Uses of RestContext in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.microservice.management with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ManifestFile
    InfoManager.resolveManifest(RestContext context)
    Resolves the application's ManifestFile from the host context's bean store.

  • Uses of RestContext in org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MockRestClient.Builder
    MockRestClient.Builder.restContext(RestContext value)
    Specifies the RestContext created for the REST bean.

    Field

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestContext
    RestChildren.addChild(Class<?> resourceClass)
    Dynamically registers a child REST resource by class, instantiating it via the parent's BeanStore.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.addChild(Object resource)
    Dynamically registers a pre-instantiated child REST resource.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.addChild(Object resource, boolean replace)
    Dynamically registers a pre-instantiated child REST resource, optionally replacing any existing child at the same resolved path.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.addChild(String path, Object resource)
    Dynamically registers a pre-instantiated child REST resource at an explicit path.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.addChild(String path, Object resource, boolean replace)
    Dynamically registers a pre-instantiated child REST resource at an explicit path, optionally replacing any existing child at the same path.
    RestContext
    RestChildMatch.getChildContext()
    Returns the child context of the REST child match.
    RestContext
    RestOpContext.getContext()
    Returns the RestContext that owns this operation context.
    RestContext
    RestRequest.getContext()
    Returns the resource context handling the request.
    RestContext
    RestResponse.getContext()
    Returns access to the inner RestContext of the class of this method.
    RestContext
    RestSession.getContext()
    Returns the context that created this call.
    RestContext
    RestContext.getParentContext()
    Returns the parent RestContext, or null for top-level resources.
    RestContext
    RestOpSession.getRestContext()
    Returns the context of the parent class of this Java method.
    RestContext
    RestContext.Args.parentContext()
    Returns the value of the parentContext record component.
    RestContext
    RestContext.postInit()
    Called during servlet initialization to invoke all RestPostInit child-last methods.
    RestContext
    RestContext.postInitChildFirst()
    Called during servlet initialization to invoke all RestPostInit child-first methods.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.removeChild(Class<?> resourceClass)
    Removes the first child whose resource class matches the given type.
    RestContext
    RestChildren.removeChild(String path)
    Removes the child registered at the given composed path.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,RestContext>
    RestChildren.asMap()
    Returns the children in this object as a map.
    static final Map<Class<?>,RestContext>
    RestContext.getGlobalRegistry()
    Returns a registry of all created RestContext objects.
    Map<Class<?>,RestContext>
    RestContext.getMixinContexts()
    Returns the per-mixin RestContext sub-contexts indexed by mixin class.

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    DebugEnablement.isDebug(RestContext context, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
    Returns true if debug is enabled on the specified class and request.
    DebugResult
    DebugConfig.resolve(RestContext context, jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
    Resolves debug for resource-level requests.

  • Uses of RestContext in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HealthAggregator.HealthResponse
    HealthAggregator.aggregate(RestContext context, Map<String,HealthIndicator> indicators, HealthProbe probe, RestResponse res)
    Evaluates the supplied indicators, summarizes their statuses, and sets the response status.
    Map<String,HealthIndicator>
    HealthAggregator.indicators(RestContext context)
    Resolves the HealthIndicator beans registered in the given context's bean store.

  • Uses of RestContext in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    LoggersManager.getLevel(RestContext context, String name)
    Returns the configured level of a single logger, for the backend resolved from the supplied context.
    Map<String,String>
    LoggersManager.getLevels(RestContext context)
    Returns a snapshot of all known loggers and their configured levels, for the backend resolved from the supplied context.
    DumpsSettings
    DumpsManager.resolveSettings(RestContext context)
    Resolves the DumpsSettings from the host context's bean store, falling back to the deny-all default.
    LoggersSettings
    LoggersManager.resolveSettings(RestContext context)
    Resolves the LoggersSettings from the host context's bean store, falling back to the read-only (JUL-backed) default.
    void
    LoggersManager.setLevel(RestContext context, String name, String level)
    Sets (or clears) the level of a single logger at runtime (process-lifetime-only), for the backend resolved from the supplied context.

  • Uses of RestContext in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer with parameters of type RestContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    io.micrometer.core.instrument.MeterRegistry
    MetricsManager.resolveRegistry(RestContext context)
    Resolves the consumer-provided MeterRegistry from the host context's bean store.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RouteDescriptions
    RouteIndexMixin.collect(RestContext hostCtx)
    Collects the route-index entries from the supplied host RestContext and any of its registered mixin sub-contexts (test/inspection helper).
